lines.speaker: Thordur
lines.text: Welcome to Blackhole, human. Can I help you?

lines.speaker: Thordur
lines.text: Why, I'm Thordur. Thordur the dwarf. A long time ago, I used to run a business letting people visit my Blackhole for fun.

lines.speaker: Thordur
lines.text: The business was good, but eventually the time came for me to retire. So now I live here in Blackhole where it's more peaceful.

lines.speaker: Thordur
lines.text: Blackhole? Well, it's sort of like a hole, and it's generally not very well lit. I'll let you work out the rest.

lines.speaker: Thordur
lines.text: If you're asking why it's here at all, it was a sort of prison. Bad people were locked here. But it's my home now.

lines.speaker: Thordur
lines.text: Just activate your Disk of Returning. It'll pop you back out to the mines.

lines.speaker: Thordur
lines.text: Why, surely you've got your Disk of Returning? I can't believe you could have lost it in here.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Nope, I don't have a Disk of Returning.

lines.speaker: Thordur
lines.text: I really don't understand humans sometimes. Hold tight and I'll sort you out...
